context_pack.industry_context: The home gardening industry has seen a resurgence in popularity, especially post-2020, as more people focus on sustainable living and self-sufficiency. The trend towards organic and home-grown produce is driving innovation in gardening tools and techniques.

terminology_glossary.Heirloom Tomatoes: Varieties of tomatoes that have been passed down through generations due to their valued characteristics.
terminology_glossary.Hybrid Tomatoes: Tomatoes that are bred from two different varieties to combine specific desirable traits.
terminology_glossary.Indeterminate: Type of tomato plant that continues to grow and produce fruit throughout the growing season.
terminology_glossary.Determinate: Type of tomato plant that grows to a fixed size and produces all its fruit around the same time.
terminology_glossary.Pruning: The practice of trimming plants to improve their structure and encourage healthy growth.

typical_workflows.traditional_process: Traditional tomato growing includes selecting seeds or seedlings, preparing soil, planting, watering, and managing pests. Optimized processes might include using advanced soil testing kits, automated watering systems, and organic pest management solutions.
